import Rating from '../components/Rating'; const ProductScreen = ({ book, onBack, onAddToCart }) => { return (

{book.name}

{book.description}

Autor
{book.author}
Kategorija
{book.category}
Vlasnik
{book.owner}
Dostupno od
{book.availableFrom}
Status {book.status}
Grad {book.city}
); }; export default ProductScreen;
